## Checklist

- [ ] Added item(s) follow the format: `- [Tool name](url) - Description starting with capital, ending in period.`
- [ ] Items are added in alphabetical order within the section
- [ ] URLs are HTTPS and point to the official project/homepage
- [ ] Descriptions explain *what the tool does* and *when you would use it* (not just a marketing tagline)
- [ ] The tool is actively maintained (last release or commit within the past 12 months)
- [ ] No duplicate entries
